Scenario: Login with PIN shorter than 4 digits
Steps:
1. Enter valid username
2. Enter 3-digit PIN
3. Click 'Enter Table'
Notes: Input capped at 4 chars via slice(0

Scenario: Login with PIN longer than 4 digits (UI enforcement)
Steps:
1. Enter valid username
2. Try typing more than 4 digits in PIN field
Expected Result: Input field stops accepting characters after 4 digits; cannot submit with >4

Scenario: Login with special characters — UI strips them
Steps: 1. Try typing special chars (@ # _ !) in the username field
Expected Result: Characters are silently stripped; only letters and numbers accepted

Scenario: Login with pasted username containing special chars
Steps:
1. Paste a username with special chars
2. Enter 4-digit PIN
3. Click 'Enter Table'
Expected Result: Underscore stripped on paste; if bypassed: Error: 'Use only letters and numbers'

Steps:
1. Log in successfully
2. Refresh the browser
Expected Result: User is still logged in (JWT restored from localStorage)
Notes: App.jsx useEffect calls api.getMe() on mount if token exists; clears token on 401

Steps:
1. Log in
2. Open settings (⚙)
3. Click 'Log Out'
Expected Result: User returned to Auth screen; JWT removed from localStorage
Notes: handleLogout calls api.logout() then clearToken() and resets all state

Scenario: Button disabled while request is in-flight
Steps:
1. Enter valid credentials
2. Click 'Enter Table' rapidly multiple times
Expected Result: Button shows '…' and cursor changes to wait; disabled=true prevents duplicate calls
Notes: disabled={busy} on button; setBusy(true) set before api call; cleared in finally block

Scenario: Forgot username link navigates to recovery flow
Expected Result: Screen changes to recovery enter-phone step
Notes: Button only renders when mode === 'login'; sets step to 'recover-phone'
